name: Quick Triple Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare the chocolate pudding according to the package directions and allow it to cool completely.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine the dry cake mix, cooled pudding, and eggs. Beat until well blended.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 9x13-inch baking pan.
5. Sprinkle with semisweet chocolate pieces and chopped walnuts.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until done.
7. Frost as usual.
